# Tidewater Property Rentals LLC

> We buy houses fast for cash in Hampton Roads, Virginia. No repairs needed, no agent fees.

## About

Tidewater Property Rentals LLC is a local cash home buying company serving the Hampton Roads area of Virginia. We provide fair cash offers for homes in any condition, helping homeowners sell quickly without the hassle of traditional real estate transactions.

## Services

- Cash home purchases in any condition
- Fast closings (as quick as 7 days)
- No repairs or renovations needed
- No real estate agent commissions
- No hidden fees or closing costs

## Areas We Serve

- Virginia Beach, VA
- Chesapeake, VA
- Norfolk, VA
- Hampton, VA
- Newport News, VA
- Portsmouth, VA
- Suffolk, VA
